## What problem does this solve

Describe the user-facing problem. Avoid jumping straight to the solution.

## Proposed approach

How you would implement it. Include affected modules, new contracts,
new tools, or new dependencies.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you ruled out and why.

## Additional context

Links to prior art, related issues, or external references.
